verdict.answer_first: B: sentence 1 gives the core answer immediately: "your local machine has something the deploy environment doesn't"; A starts with a useful but less direct list frame: "Almost always one of these"
verdict.decisiveness: A: it commits to the fastest split, "relative path... #1 or #4" and "package name... #2 or #3"; B is broader and asks more setup questions
verdict.fabrication: Both make unsupported frequency claims: A says "single most common cause"; B says "roughly in order of how often" and "#1"
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it maps the error shape directly to causes: "relative path" vs "package name"
